steps.t: Tharrkirîn is in northern Gundabad. Gerja has asked you to discover Tharrkirîn.
Tharrkirîn is in northern Clovengap. You have found Tharrkirîn, a plateau with stone-topped display platforms. You should explore the museum.
Gerja is located in Bazanmanar. You should let Gerja know what you found in Tharrkirîn.
